positive: A whimsical and ethereal arrangement of deep forest mushrooms and glowing bioluminescent flora, set against a clean, dark indigo gradient background. The composition features various intricate mushroom caps and fantasy plant life arranged in a symmetrical, circular pattern, giving a central focal point. Use a stylized, kawaii aesthetic combined with high contrast gothic elements. Key colors should include rich emerald green, sapphire blue, amethyst purple, and pops of neon cyan and yellow light emanating from the flora. Lighting must be dramatic, simulated subsurface scattering on the mushrooms, emphasizing soft glow and silhouette definition. The overall style should be suitable for a screen-printed textile, emphasizing crisp edges and clean, scalable lines. Ultra-detailed, vector quality, highly printable, magical realism.
negative: ugly, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, poorly drawn, watermark, signature, text, logo, blurry, noisy, cluttered background, low contrast, grayscale, photorealism, --ar 16:9
